description_long: This object is a rectangular stone water trough with a raised back section that supports a metal spout. The main body is a deep, open basin with thick, rough-textured stone walls and a slightly uneven rim. The back wall is vertically oriented and features a protruding, short metal spout, likely for dispensing water into the basin below. The stone appears weathered and mottled, with a predominantly gray coloration and some yellowish discoloration near the basin's interior. The overall construction is robust and utilitarian, suitable for outdoor urban environments such as parks or public squares. There are no visible handles, signage, or additional infrastructure attached to the object.
description: A rectangular stone water trough with a raised back and a short metal spout, featuring a rough, weathered surface and deep basin.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the stone basin and the raised back with the metal spout extending forward.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the thickness of the back wall and the narrow profile of the spout, with the basin's depth partially visible.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, showing the spout and the stone basin's length and depth.
description_view_3: Front view looking directly into the basin, with the spout and back wall centered and the interior of the trough clearly visible.
attribute_spout_type: short, straight metal pipe protruding horizontally from the upper back wall
attribute_mounting_location: floor-standing with a vertical back section
